evals.prompt: I want to use wiki but don't have it installed
evals.expected_output: Install instructions for wazootech-wiki; optional pip with user approval; verify wiki --help and fmt capability; ready message without suggesting wiki-create or scaffolding.
expectations: Mentions pip install wazootech-wiki or equivalent install path
Runs or instructs verification with wiki --help
Mentions fmt capability probe or wiki fmt --help
Ends with installed and ready to go or equivalent success message when CLI works
Does not mention wiki-create or wiki init as a next step

evals.prompt: Check if wiki CLI is installed
evals.expected_output: Runs wiki --help and fmt capability probe; if success, confirms installed and ready only — no follow-on suggestions.
expectations: Mentions fmt capability probe or wiki fmt --help
If CLI works, message is ready-to-go style without next-step suggestions
Does not suggest scaffolding a wiki

evals.prompt: wiki --help works but wiki fmt says unknown command — fix my install
evals.expected_output: Diagnose stale or wrong wiki on PATH; recommend upgrade/reinstall wazootech-wiki; must not say ready-to-go until capability passes.
expectations: Mentions stale or outdated wiki or wrong wiki on PATH
Recommends pip install --upgrade wazootech-wiki or wiki upgrade
Does not say installed and ready to go
Does not suggest wiki init or scaffolding
